prob.subhead: Most students prepare the same way and wonder why their score stays flat.
prob.card1_text: Random prep with no structure means every session starts from scratch.
prob.card2_text: You can't see which topics are actually holding your score back.
prob.card3_text: More hours studied does not automatically mean a better score.
prob.solution_main: Scores don't improve — even with real effort.
prob.solution_sub: You don't need more questions. You need the right focus.

val.subhead: Every feature is designed around one goal: moving your score forward, efficiently.
val.card1_title: Know exactly what to study next
val.card1_text: Follow a clear structured path based on your level — no guessing, no wasted sessions.
val.card2_title: Focus on what actually moves your score
val.card2_text: Target weak areas instead of spending time on topics you already understand.
val.card3_text: Track improvement step by step and build confidence as you prepare for exam day.

fast.label: Need to improve fast?

fast.body: Stop covering everything. Target what will move your score the most in the time you have left.
fast.detail: Most students see score improvement after 2-3 focused sessions.

stuck.label: Stuck at the same score?
stuck.title: Find exactly what is holding you back
stuck.body: Identify the specific gaps keeping your score flat and fix them one by one — systematically.
stuck.cta: Start — I keep hitting a wall
stuck.detail: Students who target specific gaps improve faster than those who study broadly.

top.label: Aiming for 100%?
top.title: Eliminate the last weak areas at the top of your range
top.body: Push past your current ceiling by fixing the small gaps that separate good from perfect.
top.detail: The final points require precision. DrFahm shows you exactly where they are.

compare.title: Compare plans
compare.footnote_qudurat: Qudurat: 2 tracks (Math + Verbal) × 5 worlds × 10 levels = 100 total levels.
compare.footnote_tahsili: Tahsili: 4 tracks × 5 worlds × 10 levels = 200 total levels.

schools.title: Preparing students at scale?
schools.sub: School licensing with bulk accounts and custom pricing.

items.q: What happens after my free trial ends?
items.a: Your progress is saved. Worlds beyond World 1 lock until you upgrade. Most students who start DrFahm upgrade — because the structure works. You'll see it from your first session.
No. DrFahm is one-time only. Pay once, use it for the full period. No subscriptions, no auto-renewals, no surprise charges. Ever.

items.q: How quickly will I see improvement?
items.a: Most students have a clearer picture of their weak areas after session one. Score improvement depends on consistent use — but the direction is clear from day one.
Same content. Same structure. The only difference is time. Silver gives you 90 days — Gold gives you a full year. If your exam is more than 3 months away, Gold is the smarter investment.

items.q: Do I need a separate plan for each exam?
items.a: Yes — each plan is exam-specific. If you're preparing for both Qudurat and Tahsili, get one plan for each. Start with the exam you're sitting first.
